channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Carboplatin Injection (54288-164-01)
item.description: Carboplatin, Injection, 50mg/5mL (NDC 54288-164-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-07-22 Company: Gland Pharma Limited Discontinued; Distributed by BPI Labs, LLC
